title: Anime totem (ZeroTwo)
description: Its a texture pack for anime zero two totem
body:
![ZeroTwoTotem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a602d6488d509f949456b5041f19bec6374235a4.png)
A Minecraft texture pack that replaces the totem of undying with Zero Two from Darling in the FranXX. When activated, instead of the standard totem animation, players see Zero Two's iconic pink-haired character design. The texture maintains the totem's glowing effect while featuring her distinctive horns, red suit, and vibrant appearance. Perfect for fans wanting to add anime aesthetic to their survival gameplay.
